content:
If you are an ordinary advocate or Citizen from a humble background, you must (Read this Article)understand why the Chief Justice of India is:

- Being abused.

- Not receiving due appreciation for introducing reforms, while certain Chief Justice was compared to Tom Cruise.😀

- Bringing listing reforms, invoking Swadeshi Jurisprudence, working to improve judicial infrastructure, opening doors for young lawyers, and recognizing the contributions of retired judges.


All of this is happening because the higher judiciary is, in the view of many, dominated by dynastic networks and the legal elite.

There is a class that wants to preserve higher judicial offices for its own lineage.

They want only the elite, the elite, and the elite in the higher judiciary.(Western centric)

Can those who remain insulated from ordinary life truly understand the lived realities of the common citizen?

Allow this and forget about the kind of justice you are asking for.
